_comment: Scenario probes for P3 full (multi-practitioner preference, single hardcoded location): covers STEP 3 practitioner disambiguation, silent confirm_time escape route, cross-object slot prohibition in MULTI-PRACTITIONER OFFER, no location question (single location), and asap_slots with practitioner in payload.

scenarios.name: P1 — STEP 3 practitioner ask before timeframe when 2+ practitioners match service

history.content: I'd like to book a chiropractic appointment

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Did you want to book with [A] or [B], or is anyone fine?' before asking 'When would you like to come in?' — STEP 3 fires when 2+ practitioners match {{appointment_type}} in {{practitioner_services}}. FAIL if agent skips to 'When would you like to come in?' without asking for practitioner preference, or asks about location (P3 has a single hardcoded location so no location question should ever appear).

scenarios.name: C1 — Confirmation: SILENT universal_router confirm_time with zero spoken output

history.content: I'd like to see Dr Park if possible
When would you like to come in?

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_abc", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Dr Park", "practitioner_id": "prac_p", "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Bayswater Chiropractic", "date": "2026-06-18", "day_of_week": "Thursday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Dr Park", "practitioner_id": "prac_p", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-18", "slot_groups": {"morning": ["9:00 AM", "11:00 AM"]}, "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Bayswater Chiropractic"}]}]}
I've got 9:00 AM or 11:00 AM with Dr Park — does either of those work for you?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: (1) agent produces ZERO spoken output AND (2) calls universal_router intent='confirm_time' with appointment_date='2026-06-18', appointment_time='09:00', practitioner_id='prac_p', business_id='biz_1' in the SAME silent response. FAIL if agent speaks any confirmation phrase (e.g. 'Perfect, 9:00 AM Thursday with Dr Park') — P3 CONFIRMATION is a SILENT escape route; Node 6a/6b confirms aloud. Also FAIL if agent calls smart_voice_agent instead of universal_router.

scenarios.name: S1 — Multi-practitioner offer: first/last per practitioner from their own array only

history.content: When would you like to come in?

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_abc", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Dr Park", "practitioner_id": "prac_p", "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Bayswater Chiropractic", "date": "2026-06-22", "day_of_week": "Monday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Dr Park", "practitioner_id": "prac_p", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-22", "slot_groups": {"afternoon": ["1:00 PM", "2:30 PM", "4:00 PM"]}, "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Bayswater Chiropractic"}]}, {"practitioner_name": "Dr Chen", "practitioner_id": "prac_c", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-22", "slot_groups": {"afternoon": ["12:30 PM", "3:30 PM"]}, "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Bayswater Chiropractic"}]}]}

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks: 'I've got 1:00 PM or 4:00 PM with Dr Park, and 12:30 PM or 3:30 PM with Dr Chen — who works better?' (first and last from each practitioner's OWN slot_groups array; no location suffix since both are at the same single location). FAIL if: (a) agent uses Dr Park's last slot (4:00 PM) for Dr Chen — cross-object violation; (b) agent lists all 3 of Dr Park's times; (c) agent appends a location name per practitioner when both share the same hardcoded location.

scenarios.name: N1 — ASAP with practitioner in payload when practitioner preference set

history.content: When would you like to come in?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls smart_voice_agent with intent='asap_slots', start_date from {{current_time_local}}, and practitioner set to Dr Chen's ID (confirmed_practitioner_id stored from STEP 3). FAIL if agent omits the practitioner field from the payload when a practitioner preference has been confirmed, or calls intent='find_next_available' instead of intent='asap_slots'.
